label: 区域全并
description: 对一个 01 网格列表整体求并集：输出尺寸取列表内所有网格的逐维最大值；任一网格在某格非零则输出 1，全部为零（或越界）则输出 0。空列表或全无效网格时返回空。
description-en: Aggregate union over a list of 0/1 grids. Output shape is the per-axis max of all grids in the list; a cell is 1 if any grid is non-zero there, otherwise 0. Out-of-bounds cells are treated as 0. Returns empty for an empty or fully invalid list.
icon: 深色背景上多张方形网格叠合汇聚成一张更亮的并集网格，体现把整个列表全部并起来成一张，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: regions
inputs.label: 区域列表
inputs.description: 一组 01 网格列表；逐格求并归一为 01。各网格尺寸可不同，越界格按 0 处理。
inputs.description-en: A list of 0/1 grids; merged cell-wise into a normalized 0/1 union. Grids may differ in size; out-of-bounds cells are treated as 0.

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 并集
outputs.description: 列表全并结果；尺寸为所有输入逐维最大值，归一为 01。
outputs.description-en: Aggregate union of the list; shape is per-axis max, normalized to 0/1.
